title: Traveler's Garden
description: A garden you can carry in your inventory to keep producing food. Good for mining and nomad life.
body:
A garden you can carry in your inventory to keep producing food. Good for mining and nomad life. Compitable with Farmer's Delight or just use vanilla crops.  But it has a downside of taking one slot of your inventory because it doesn't work in chests!

Default is long time between each harvest but it has a config for you to modify for your taste. Most important thing is your ideas (in single player mod) so you can even set it up to be every minute.

It's actually easy to craft, to discover the recipy you need to find seed
